violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings in the storage closet. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and increase visits as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door reach-in and 2 door reach-in shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The wall in the storage closet area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
At the time of inspection, observed dishwasher to be leaking into container. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
Light shield above food prep was in poor repair, observed crack. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
Observed missing ceiling tile in dry storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
